comment: Q&A retrieval eval over the seeded Vulcan corpus. expectedIds must appear in retrievedObligationIds for full retrieval recall. Multi-id questions make chance retrieval (14-record window over the register) much harder to pass blind.

questions.question: We have a time-sensitive new deal in sub-Saharan Africa. What obligations do we have?
Which investors hold MFN election rights?
What do we have to send Hokuriku every quarter?
What happens if a key person leaves Fund II?
Can a limited partner in Fund I sell its interest to someone else?
How much of Fund II can go into emerging markets, and who has to approve going further?
What anti-corruption compliance paperwork do we owe EDFC each year?
Which kinds of companies can EDFC's commitment never be drawn for?
What periodic financial reports does Fund II owe all its LPs, and on what deadlines?
Can Hokuriku transfer its interest to a wholly-owned affiliate without asking us first?
What does the General Partner owe Norrland every year on ESG?
What does Fund I need before concentrating more than 15% of commitments in a single company?
